questions.question: Are HTTP URLs rejected and only HTTPS URLs accepted?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests verifying http:// URLs are rejected; inspect addServer validation logic
evidence_required: test file path showing HTTP rejection
questions.pass_criteria: Tests exist that verify http:// URLs throw error, https:// URLs succeed; validation code checks URL prefix

questions.question: Do property-based tests verify health check timeout behavior?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests that create unresponsive server and verify 3s timeout
questions.pass_criteria: Test exists using local HTTP server fixture that delays >3s; verifies checkHealth returns unhealthy within 3.5s

questions.question: Are server selection fallback scenarios tested?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests that configure multiple servers with different health states and verify fallback
questions.pass_criteria: Tests exist for: first server healthy (returns it), first unhealthy second healthy (returns second), all unhealthy (returns null)

questions.question: Does BlossomServerService follow database access patterns?
questions.actionable_check: Review service to verify it uses getDatabase() pattern and raw sql.js API (not Knex for queries)
questions.pass_criteria: Service uses getDatabase() from connection.ts; uses db.exec() and db.run() for queries; follows BlobStorageService pattern

questions.question: Are duplicate URL prevention tests comprehensive?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests that add same URL twice for same identity and verify error
questions.pass_criteria: Test exists that adds server, then attempts to add same URL again, verifies error thrown

questions.question: Are reordering edge cases tested?
questions.actionable_check: Search for tests verifying reorder with invalid URLs, duplicates, missing servers
questions.pass_criteria: Tests exist for: reorder with URL not in list (throws), reorder with duplicates (throws), reorder preserves count

questions.question: Does the implementation satisfy AC-024 (per-identity server list)?
questions.actionable_check: Review database schema and service to verify servers are isolated per identity
questions.pass_criteria: blossom_servers table has identity_pubkey column; tests verify servers for identity A don't appear in identity B's list

questions.question: Does the implementation satisfy AC-026 (health check before upload)?
questions.actionable_check: Verify checkHealth method uses HEAD request with 3s timeout
questions.pass_criteria: checkHealth uses HEAD request (not GET); timeout set to 3000ms; tests verify timeout behavior

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search for unused functions, classes, imports in src/main/blossom/, src/main/ipc/blossom-handlers.ts, src/renderer/api/blossom-api.ts, src/renderer/components/BlossomServerSettings/
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused code in story scope

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check for similar logic to other services that could be shared (e.g., IPC handler patterns, database access)
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No duplicate implementations; follows existing patterns consistently

mandatory_questions.question: Do integration tests validate the story's workflow?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify integration test exists that exercises complete workflow: add servers → reorder → check health → select healthy
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least one integration test covers the happy path end-to-end including health check and fallback
